name: ddl-types
description: Define core TypeScript interfaces for DDL generator (DDLOutput, TableDef, ColumnDef, ForeignKeyDef, SqlDialect)
acceptanceCriteria: DDLOutput interface includes: tables[], foreignKeys[], junctionTables[], executionOrder[]
TableDef interface includes: name, columns[], primaryKey, foreignKeys[]
ColumnDef interface includes: name, type, nullable, defaultValue?, checkConstraint?
ForeignKeyDef interface includes: name, table, column, referencesTable, referencesColumn, onDelete
SqlDialect interface includes: name, escapeIdentifier(name), mapType(jsonType, format?), supportsForeignKeys, supportsCheckConstraints
All interfaces exported with JSDoc documentation
